# Vendored browser libraries

- `chart.umd.min.js` — Chart.js v4.5.0, MIT License, downloaded from `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.5.0/dist/chart.umd.min.js`.
- SHA-256: `2f27bcf471b2d69dd78494f6e2172fb28470eb843820e2f96bb85d39f9618d30`

Vendored locally so the GitHub Pages dashboard has no runtime CDN dependency for chart rendering.
